title: nepeta polyodonta
intro: Nepeta polyodonta, also known as Mountain Mint, is a type of perennial herb in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North Africa, and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe digestive issues and relieve inflammation. The plant's essential oils, which contain compounds like nepetalactone and polyodonta, have been traditionally used to calm anxiety and insomnia, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Nepeta polyodonta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, IBS, and other gastrointestinal issues.
